description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a sturdy light beige wooden frame and a dark brown upholstered seat and backrest. The backrest is cylindrical and runs the full width of the chaise, adorned with evenly spaced button tufting for added visual interest. The seat is flat and wide, with subtle stitched divisions that provide a sense of structure and comfort. The frame curves upward at both ends to cradle the backrest, creating a distinctive silhouette. The legs are integrated into the frame, providing stable support while maintaining a sleek profile. This piece is well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or contemporary outdoor spaces.
description: A modern chaise with a light beige wooden frame and dark brown tufted upholstery, featuring a cylindrical backrest and a wide, structured seat. Its minimalist design and sturdy build make it ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden frame supporting the cylindrical, tufted backrest and the flat, wide seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the backrest, the button tufting, and the broad seat surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the curved frame and cylindrical backrest, emphasizing the chaise's symmetry.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous cylindrical backrest and the clean lines of the frame and seat.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a continuous cylindrical bolster upholstered in dark brown material, featuring evenly spaced button tufting along its length. It is supported by the upward-curving wooden frame, giving it a modern and distinctive appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: There are no traditional armrests; the upward curves of the frame at each end provide minimal lateral support but do not function as full armrests.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are integrated into the light beige wooden frame, forming a continuous, curved support structure that extends from the base to cradle the backrest. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark brown with button tufting on the cylindrical backrest and subtle stitched divisions on the seat, giving it a structured yet minimalist look.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, wide seat cushion integrated into the frame and a single cylindrical backrest cushion running the full width of the chaise. Both cushions are attached and not loose, providing a streamlined appearance.
